aiGuidance.extraction: Infer from the decision question or statement: compress to a short noun phrase identifying the topic. Do not start with We will — use the subject of the decision instead.
aiGuidance.purpose: A short, scannable label (3–8 words) that identifies this decision at a glance in a list or document view.

instructions: Give the decision a short, scannable label — a few words naming the topic, not a full sentence. Write it as the subject of the decision (e.g. “Meeting frequency for pilot”), not as “We will…”. It is what people see first in a list, so make it recognisable at a glance.
name: title
